---
title: "White Birch (Betula alba)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)

**Genus:** [*Betula*](/trees/genus/betula.html)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 346 — White birch](../346.html) |  |
| [Tree 354 — White birch](../354.html) |  |
| [Tree 365 — White birch](../365.html) |  |
| [Tree 368 — White birch](../368.html) |  |
| [Tree 369 — White birch](../369.html) |  |
| [Tree 374 — White birch](../374.html) |  |
| [Tree 376 — White birch](../376.html) |  |
| [Tree 379 — White birch](../379.html) |  |
| [Tree 381 — White birch](../381.html) |  |
